title: aws-kms: into_service_error() panics on non-service errors
description: secretx-aws-kms/src/lib.rs sign() and public_key_der() call .into_service_error() on the SDK error before any check that it IS a service error. If a network failure, timeout, or SDK-level error occurs (SdkError::TimeoutError, SdkError::DispatchFailure, etc.), into_service_error() panics. Trigger: network outage or request timeout during KMS sign/public_key_der → async task panics instead of returning SecretError::Unavailable.
